description: Arithmetic and logic unit for RV32I operations

ports.name: zero
ports.description: Zero flag, asserted when result equals zero

functionality: Performs arithmetic and logical operations on 32-bit operands A and B as selected by op. For shift operations SLL, SRL, SRA only the lower 5 bits of B are used as shift amount. SLT performs signed comparison; SLTU performs unsigned comparison. Outputs the computed result and a zero flag (result == 0). All operations are combinational.
